purpose: Authoritative obsolete-test enumeration gating M5. Resolves the §1 (~36) vs §M5 (~26) vs investigation (~26) numerical inconsistency by being the single source of truth (per validator_mandate obsolete_test_count_authoritative_in_m1).

categories.core_bank_content: Tests asserting per-language source/sink Vec content. M3 deletes the per-language Vecs (collapsed onto canonical taint AST banks).
categories.core_propagation_sanitization_helpers: Tests for inline Python-only propagation/sanitization helpers (extract_propagation, extract_assigned_variable, type_coercion_*, sanitized_*, unsanitized_*). M3 replaces inline propagation with compute_taint_with_tree dispatch — these helpers and their tests become dead.
categories.cli_bank_tests: Tests for CLI-local const-pattern source/sink lookup tables + TaintTracker (Python tree-sitter path). M4 collapses Python path onto canonical compute_taint_with_tree.
categories.string_interpolation_helper: Tests for the string-interpolation detection helper used in Python-path string interpolation flows. M4 verification: f-string flow must remain covered by canonical AST after collapse — flag DECISION-PENDING if not.

note: Obsolete count is 32, not 36. Plan §1 cited ~36 (loose); investigation/§M5 cited ~26 (also loose). The authoritative count from this enumeration is 32 (32 DELETE entries above), of which 1 (test_string_interpolation_detection) is DECISION-PENDING for M4. Final M5 deletion count: 31 confirmed + 1 conditional = 31-32.
